Package org.keycloak.protocol.oid4vc.model

Class CredentialScopeRepresentation

java.lang.Object
org.keycloak.representations.idm.ClientScopeRepresentation
org.keycloak.protocol.oid4vc.model.CredentialScopeRepresentation
public class CredentialScopeRepresentation extends ClientScopeRepresentation
An extension of ClientScopeRepresentation which and adds additional functionality for OID4VCI
Author:
Thomas Diesler
